note: 跨论文共享数据集地址单一真源。本地 + HPC 路径、下载源、用途、状态都在此。任何脚本/config 引用数据集前先查此表，不重复硬编码、不臆想路径。新增数据集或换路径只改这里 + 在引用处指向。状态: ready=就位可用 / partial=部分就位 / todo=待下载。

hosts.hpc: XJTLU HPC (gpu4090, 4 卡 qos) — 见 project/HPC_WORKFLOW.md / memory project_hpc_xjtlu

medianomaly_bench.name: MedIAnomaly benchmark (7 集)
medianomaly_bench.subsets: RSNA(胸片) / VinDr-CXR(胸片) / BrainTumor(脑MRI) / LAG(眼底) / Camelyon16(病理,有像素mask) / BraTS2021(脑MRI FLAIR,有像素mask) / ISIC2018-Task3(皮镜,nevus=正常)
medianomaly_bench.local: BraTS2021: project/meeting/MedAD-FailMap/data/BraTS2021/ ; BrainTumor(脑MRI): data/external/medianomaly/BrainTumor/ (images/ 2200 jpg + data.json split) ; RSNA(胸片): data/external/medianomaly/RSNA/ (images/ 5851 png + data.json + stage_2_train_labels.csv) ; LAG/VinCXR/Camelyon16 still TODO on Zenodo rec 12677223
medianomaly_bench.source: Zenodo 分集 tar.gz: https://zenodo.org/api/records/12677223/files/<NAME>.tar.gz/content (BraTS2021 70MB / BrainTumor 42MB / LAG 202MB / RSNA 568MB / VinCXR 620MB / Camelyon16 891MB；注意是分集非单 zip)；codebase github.com/caiyu6666/MedIAnomaly。ISIC2018 不在此 Zenodo→本地 HAM10000 NV(6705图)零下载对接
medianomaly_bench.purpose: 重建式 AD 失败边界主 benchmark; 仅 BraTS2021/Camelyon16 支持像素级评估(协变量分层用 BraTS test/annotation mask); Phase 0 只用 BraTS2021。【fmreg 复用 BraTS2021 多序列(T1/T2/FLAIR)做同模态可变形配准主战场, 已 ready 免下】
medianomaly_bench.note_artioodbench: ArtiOODBench cross-source pairs: CXR P1=NIH(ID) vs VinDr(OOD local) / P2=NIH vs RSNA(OOD) ; MRI P3=BraTS2021 normal(ID) vs BrainTumor(OOD) ; derm P4=HAM10000(ID) vs ISIC2020(OOD local). cross-source task label=source-institution not normal/anomaly.

vindrcxr_domainB.purpose: NCA-JEPA 路线 B — 遗忘探针域 B 续训集（对齐域 A NIH 10k 规模）
vindrcxr_domainB.structure: train/<id>.png (15000) + test/<id>.png (3000); split 路径相对 local 根, 正斜杠
vindrcxr_domainB.note: NCA-JEPA 路线B遗忘探针域B. 纯SSL无标签(train_meta.csv未用). n_subset=10000采样=9000train+1000val

oasis.name: OASIS (brain MRI registration)
oasis.source: https://www.oasis-brains.org/ ; Learn2Reg 预处理版 https://learn2reg.grand-challenge.org/Datasets/ (OASIS-1 基, 160×224×192, 35 FreeSurfer 标签可算 Dice; 需 grand-challenge 账号)
oasis.purpose: FMReg 脑 MRI 可变形配准【正式 benchmark】; 中训 inter-subject 全量 + 35 标签算 Dice + neg_jac 折叠率。注: G5 killshot 实际用 BraTS2021 flair(非 OASIS, G6 卡/旧 Entry 措辞误写已订正)

ixi.name: IXI (brain MRI registration, junyuchen 预处理版)
ixi.local: project/meeting/FMReg/data/IXI/IXI_data/ (Train 403/Val 58/Test 115 + atlas.pkl, 160×192×224, 每 .pkl=(image,label) FreeSurfer 皮层下分割; zip 原档 IXI_data.pkl 1.54GB 同目录可删)
ixi.hpc: TODO (Gate1 G2-A 上传是拍板点先报)
ixi.source: https://github.com/junyuchen245/Preprocessed_IXI_Dataset (GDrive id=1-VQewCVNj5eTtc3eQGhTM2yXBQmgm8Ol, 1.54GB zip 误名.pkl, atlas-to-patient, 160×192×224, 含 atlas + 皮层下 FreeSurfer 分割标签, 免注册); 原始 http://brain-development.org/ixi-dataset/
ixi.purpose: FMReg 脑配准【Gate1 G2-A gating 主战场】(atlas-to-patient, 带标签可算 Dice/NCC_LM); TransMorph 标准集, 与 OASIS 互补
ixi.status: ready(local 已下载解压 2026-06-18; HPC 待上传)

abdomenmrct.name: Learn2Reg AbdomenMRCT (跨模态 MRI-CT 腹部配准)
abdomenmrct.n: 8 配对 + 90 非配对 / 8 test (122 scans 总; 192×160×192 @ 2mm iso; 4 器官标注: liver/spleen/left+right kidney, test 集额外 gallbladder/stomach/aorta/portal vein/pancreas)
abdomenmrct.local: D:/YJ-Agent/data/AbdomenMRCT/ (已下解压验通; Train/ 8配对 + Test/ 8配对; 命名 img<ID>_tcia_{CT,MR}.nii.gz + seg<ID>_tcia_{CT,MR}.nii.gz, 模态靠_CT/_MR后缀, 配对靠4位<ID>; 标签{1,2,3,4}=liver/spleen/L+R kidney bg=0; 滤 ._ 垃圾; run-004 C047 killshot + fmreg 共用)
abdomenmrct.source: 免登录直链(Lübeck 云,不需 grand-challenge 账号,1.8GB): train=https://cloud.imi.uni-luebeck.de/s/DgGZFpTKBEn8PpS/download | test=https://cloud.imi.uni-luebeck.de/s/zP5RekyR6xeKCPp/download | ROI masks(gdrive)=https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=1pW_UNe28_7gnZ4GynpV6XvLP-hLQrbyP | 官方页 https://learn2reg.grand-challenge.org/Learn2Reg2021/ (ref arXiv:2112.04489)
abdomenmrct.purpose: FMReg 跨模态 L4 lever【首选】; FM-based MR-CT 生成式配准是真空地(FlowReg/对手全无跨模态)。run-004 C047 killshot: 真配对 CT/MRI 验跨模态 dynamics collapse 是否=domain-shift
abdomenmrct.status: ready (local, 2026-06-18 下载解压+nibabel 验通; 192×160×192 float32; 90 非配对在辅助 BCV-CT/CHAOS-MR 直链未下, killshot 用 16 配对足够)

dirlab.name: Dir-Lab 4DCT (肺呼吸配准, TRE benchmark)
dirlab.source: https://www.dir-lab.com/ (4D-CT 10例, inhale/exhale 300 手工 landmark/对, 1.0×1.0×2.5mm; 公开免费, 官网可达性中训前确认)
dirlab.purpose: FMReg 肺配准【TRE 金标准 benchmark】; FM 少步配准在肺 4DCT 是真空地

learn2reg.name: Learn2Reg benchmark
learn2reg.source: https://learn2reg.grand-challenge.org/ (多任务: OASIS脑/AbdomenCT-CT/AbdomenMRCT跨模态/肺CT/LUMIR脑/ReMIND超声-MRI; 公开 leaderboard + 官方 baseline; 指标 TRE/Dice/DSC30/HD95/%|J|≤0/SDlogJ 几何均值排名)
learn2reg.purpose: FMReg 多任务配准框架来源; 子集 oasis/abdomenmrct 已单列; leaderboard 对照 VoxelMorph/TransMorph/LapIRN/uniGradICON

lidc_idri.name: LIDC-IDRI
lidc_idri.local: D:/YJ-Agent/project/meeting/DisagreePred/data/LIDC_subset (150 scan/15G,2026-06-19扩);派生件 results/patches 289npy + results/a2_seg_masks 289 + lidc_disagree_labels.csv
lidc_idri.hpc: /gpfs/work/bio/jiayu2403/disagree/ (2026-06-19传~25M派生件:results/patches 289npy + a2_seg_masks 289 + lidc_disagree_labels_hpc.csv[patch路径改写HPC绝对];非原始DICOM。KILL-1 job1471101)
lidc_idri.source: TCIA 公开免费 https://www.cancerimagingarchive.net/collection/lidc-idri/ ; 全集 1018 CT ~124GB(过大不下,用户拍板); 4 医师独立标注; pylidc cluster_annotations tol默认=slice_thickness(文档写pixel_spacing是bug); 存在性分歧65.2%(2669被标结节仅928获4/4一致,Armato2011 PMC3041807; 旧稿margin0.22=Dong2017边缘评分分歧≠存在性,勿混). 【精简路径(2026-06-18 researcher探,避124GB)】①XML-only<200MB=pylidc无DICOM纯查k分歧标签+坐标(免费,先算分布) https://wiki.cancerimagingarchive.net/pages/viewpage.action?pageId=1966254 ②DICOM-LIDC-IDRI-Nodules 2.51GB=per-annotator SEG mask(非CT像素) https://www.cancerimagingarchive.net/analysis-result/dicom-lidc-idri-nodules/ ③KILL-1需CT图像patch→NBIA子集下~150-200 scan≈18-30GB(MIC-DKFZ/LIDC-IDRI-processing保per-annotator). ④LUNA16衍生丢标注者身份不可用/QUBIQ无肺结节排除
lidc_idri.split: 立项后定 (KILL-1 baseline 先行)
lidc_idri.purpose: DisagreePred 主 benchmark: 预测 4-annotator 分歧本身(非 majority-vote 取 GT)。KILL-1 gating=下载后跑分歧可预测性 baseline,AUROC≤0.60 即砍。QUBIQ 备用第二集验普适
